An '''asteroid hopper''' or '''Verpine asteroid hopper''' was an unusual [[Realspace/Legends|space]]-capable short-range [[Repulsorlift/Legends|repulsorlift]] vehicle designed by the [[Verpine/Legends|Verpine]] to operate in dense [[Asteroid field/Legends|asteroid belts]], such as the [[Roche asteroid field]]. Rather than relying on [[Ion engine/Legends|ion engines]], a Verpine hopper "bounced" from asteroid to [[Asteroid/Legends|asteroid]] using its repulsor engines, relying on gyroscopic stabilization to minimize discomfort for its [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] and passengers.

==Characteristics==
[[File:Squib_in_asteroid_hopper.png|thumb|left|150px|Squib in an Asteroid Hopper around [[Korad]].]]
Though able to ferry its passengers through the [[Vacuum/Legends|vacuum]] of space, it was dependent on the asteroids' mass for movement, making it unable to travel through deep space.
